overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character riding a horse through a snowy mountain landscape. The journey progresses from an open valley with scattered pine trees into narrow rocky passes and finally into a fog-filled canyon with extremely low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain valley with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at steady pace through open snow-covered terrain toward distant mountains

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree with heavy snow on branches
deep snow covering the valley floor with visible horse tracks
snow-capped mountain peaks surrounding the valley
partially frozen lake visible in the valley basin
large rock formation covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide snowy mountain valley with scattered pine trees. The character rides a horse across deep snow toward distant peaks, with a frozen lake visible in the basin below. The visibility is clear with full sky exposure.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ascent with steep cliff drops

events.description: horse turns right and begins ascending rocky terrain along cliff edge

agents.ego_description: navigating the horse up a rocky slope with a steep drop visible to the left

entered.detail: steep rock wall with patches of snow
sheer cliff edge dropping into the valley below

segments.scene_description: The horse turns right and climbs onto rocky terrain, leaving the trees behind. The path follows a cliff edge with a steep drop to the left, and the camera navigates around snow-covered boulders and rock outcrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain ledge with steep cliff drop on one side

events.description: entering narrow mountain pass with steep vertical drop on left side
atmospheric fog density increases significantly reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: carefully riding along a narrow snowy ledge with a steep chasm to the left

entered.detail: treacherous narrow trail carved into the mountainside
vertical rock face forming the right boundary of the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows to a dangerous ledge with a vertical cliff wall on the right and a steep drop to the left. The horse continues forward along the snowy trail as fog begins to roll in, gradually obscuring the distant valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep fog-filled mountain canyon with rock arch

events.description: entering deep fog-filled canyon with visibility reduced to near zero

agents.ego_description: riding slowly into dense fog through a narrow canyon passage

entered.detail: rock wall appearing on the left side enclosing the path
stone arch formation spanning the canyon ahead
thick white fog obscuring all distant features

segments.scene_description: The scene descends into a narrow canyon completely enveloped in heavy fog. The path becomes enclosed by rock walls on both sides, with a natural stone arch visible ahead through the mist. Visibility drops dramatically as the horse continues into the whiteout conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a wide, clear mountain valley into a claustrophobic, fog-shrouded canyon. It begins with a horse riding across deep snow and scattered pine trees toward distant peaks, with a frozen lake resting in the basin below. As the horse turns right, the terrain shifts from the open valley to a rocky cliff edge, navigating around snow-covered boulders and steep drops. The path then narrows into a dangerous ledge pressed against a vertical cliff wall, where rolling fog begins to obscure the distant landscape. Finally, the scene descends into a narrow canyon enveloped in heavy mist, passing under a natural stone arch as visibility drops into a complete whiteout.
